message:
feat(core): Add error masking and server builder improvements

fastmcp-core/error.rs (+160 lines):
- Add masked() method to McpError for secure client responses
- Hides internal details (file paths, stack traces) from InternalError,
  ToolExecutionError, and Custom error codes
- Preserves client errors (ParseError, InvalidParams, etc.) as-is
- Comprehensive documentation with usage examples

fastmcp-core/context.rs:
- Streamline context handling
- Remove redundant code paths

fastmcp-server/builder.rs (+83 lines):
- Enhance server builder pattern
- Additional configuration options
- Improved ergonomics for server setup

fastmcp-server/lib.rs (+32 lines):
- Integration of error masking into response handling
- Expose builder improvements at crate level

The error masking feature prevents sensitive information leakage in
production environments while preserving useful error details for
legitimate client errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
